creator: freebsd@dirichs.fastmail.fm
text:
I initiated the upgrade process with

portmaster -a

which led me directly into this issue. You are correct in saying that deinstalling gdal and giflib first resolves the problem. Is it unreasonable to expect the ports upgrade process to run flawless? After all, in this case, simply removing the first "-L/usr/local/lib" from the compiler parameters would make the build process more robust and avoid the problem altogether.
